business.headline: PPF vs SIP: Where will Rs 50,000 to Rs 1 lakh grow faster in 10 years?You're putting aside Rs 50,000 to Rs 1 lakh every month, aiming to build a solid corpus over the next 10 years. Garden Reach shares jump 18%: Why GRSE stock price rose today?GRSE's strong financial results boost investor confidence and lift shipbuilding stocks. GRSE reported a record annual turnover of Rs 6,400 crore for FY26, compared to Rs 5,076 crore in the previous financial year, marking a 26% rise.

Will rupee slide to 100 against the US dollar as Iran war drags on?Rupee has declined by around 10% over the past year and is among the worst-performing currencies in Asia this year. Analysts say that while authorities are trying to slow the fall, these steps may only provide short-term support.

The Musical in New York. Due to the health scare, she was forced to make an abrupt exit before the show had concluded.

The Pitt's Laetitia Hollard on what went behind the sensitive rape kit episode The Pitt Season 2 featured a deeply sensitive episode on sexual assault. Actor Laetitia Hollard highlighted the extensive preparation and empathy involved in portraying trauma-informed care.

Zendaya plans to disappear after packed 2026 slate, fears fans may get sick of her Hollywood star Zendaya is set to dominate 2026 with a series of thrilling projects. After this bustling year, she plans to take a brief break from the limelight, promising a return in 2027.

Priyanka Chopra remembers her father during Golden Temple visit, shares pics Priyanka Chopra took a serene break from her busy schedule to visit the Golden Temple in Amritsar. She also performed seva at the gurdwara.

Aakhri Sawal: First look of Sanjay Dutt's film about RSS out on Hanuman Jayanti The teaser of Sanjay Dutt's upcoming film Aakhri Sawal will be released nationwide on April 2, on the occasion of Hanuman Jayanti. The film is based on the 100-year journey of RSS (Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh).

Priyadarshan's 100th film starring Mohanlal to go on floors in December | Exclusive Priyadarshan has teamed up with actor Mohanlal for his 100th directorial venture. We have learnt that the story will explore the emotional beats of a father-son relationship.

For a moment, it felt like Aslam: Pak cop's wife praises Sanjay Dutt for Dhurandhar Naureen Aslam reacted to Dhurandhar's portrayal of her late husband, praising Sanjay Dutt's performance but questioning key aspects of the film. She pointed out what the film got right, and where she felt it missed the mark on Chaudhry Aslam's real story.

general news.headline: US nearing completion of all objectives in Iran war: Trump in address to nationIn his nationally televised address, Donald Trump warned that the US would strike Iran "extremely hard" over the next two to three weeks and push the country back to 'Stone Age'.

One giant leap again: Nasa launches four astronauts on historic Moon trip  LIVENasa's first crewed lunar voyage in over 50 years is commanded by Reid Wiseman, and carries a historic crew that includes the first woman, the first person of colour, and the first Canadian astronaut on a round trip to the far side of the Moon.

Iranian President writes open letter to Americans: Read full textIn the message, Masoud Pezeshkian rejected the idea that Iran poses a security threat, arguing that such claims do not align with "historical reality".

Trump says US close to Iran goals in 32 days, lists all wars that lasted longerFrom World War 2 to the Vietnam war, Trump pointed to drawn-out conflicts in the past that the US was embroiled in to suggest that the military operation in Iran, which he hopes to wrap up in six weeks, is no cause for concern.

Moment four astronauts launched on first Moon mission of 21st centuryThe crew will not land on the lunar surface as this flight is a test run, designed to put Nasa's new spacecraft, Orion, and its giant rocket, the Space Launch System (SLS), through their paces.

28 astronauts went to the Moon. But how many actually set foot on it?Including the four on Artemis 2, 28 astronauts have been on lunar missions. But how many humans have actually set foot on the Moon? This story will tell you this and about those who flew close but didn't land.

She described a surge of 'depressed' troops spending heavily and casually revealing they were heading to the Middle East soon.

He believes AI can take over coordination work, helping organisations run faster and more efficiently with fewer layers.

Before sunrise, it's over: Inside the 6 am layoff cultureA viral post claims layoffs are being timed for isolation, not efficiency. Even if exaggerated, it reveals a deeper truth about how modern job cuts are designed.

Economist Parakala Prabhakar claimed that around 4.16% of the total votes were cast between 11:45 pm and 2 am, and that these votes were won by the NDA.

Iran has the Trump card, Trump has the JokerIran is waging an economic war as it fights the military might of the US and Israel. Because causing damage to the US economy is where it will hurt Washington the most.

Live: Build up some delayed courage, take control of Hormuz, Trump tells alliesDonald Trump Address on Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to deliver an update on Iran in an address at 9 PM ET (6:30 AM IST), as mixed messaging continues to surround Washington's stance on the ongoing conflict. On Wednesday, Trump claimed that Iran had reached out seeking a ceasefire, writing, "Iran's New Regime President, much less radicalized and far more intelligent than his predecessors, has just asked the United States of America for a CEASEFIRE!" He went on to link any potential truce to conditions in the Strait of Hormuz, adding, "We will consider when Hormuz Strait is open, free, and clear. Until then, we are blasting Iran into oblivion or, as they say, back to the Stone Ages!" The remarks came a day after Trump suggested the war could end soon, saying the month-long conflict may conclude within two to three weeks and that oil prices would come tumbling down once US forces withdraw. However, Iran has firmly pushed back, with its Foreign Ministry calling the ceasefire claim "false and baseless" and denying that any such request had been made. Meanwhile, Houthi rebels in Yemen fired ballistic missiles at southern Israel, describing the strike as part of a coordinated effort with Iran and Hezbollah. The attack comes as the conflict intensifies, with Iran and its allies stepping up joint operations in response to ongoing US and Israeli strikes. Stay with indiatoday.in for the latest and live updates.
